data.title: Author Challenges Extremes in Christian Views on Sex and Intimacy
data.description: A recent book has been published in Edgewood, Ky on April 6, 2026, providing a unique outlook on intimacy, faith, and relational development for married couples. Authored by Roy M. Myers, Ph.D., DMin, the book incorporates biblical principles, pastoral insights, and interviews with couples. This marks Myers' debut book and aims to offer valuable perspectives on these important aspects of marriage.

data.title: Altai Announces Transfer of Listing to NEX
data.description: Altai Resources Inc. (NEX: ATI.H) has been transferred from the TSX Venture Exchange to the NEX board, effective today. The 90-day Notice to Transfer to NEX has been withdrawn by the TSXV, following Altai's announcement on February 17, 2026. The Company's trading symbol has changed to ATI.H, while its name, CUSIP number, and capital consolidation remain unchanged. Altai is actively seeking new mining exploration properties as part of its ongoing pursuit of strategic alternatives.

data.title: TMC Financing Promotes Ron Lien and Kisha Gant to Executive Leadership Roles
data.description: Executive promotions at TMC Financing in Oakland, California on April 6, 2026, saw Ron Lien elevated to Chief Credit Officer and Kisha Gant to Chief Operating Officer. These appointments signify a strategic move to enhance disciplined execution and leadership within the organization. This development comes as TMC Financing achieved a historic milestone in the Small Business Administration (SBA) 504 program. The company is continuing to strengthen its position in the industry, with a focus on effective management and operational excellence.(Word count: 86)

data.title: Polymarket to adopt USDC-backed token, drops USDC.e. Upgrades to include new contracts; bridged stablecoin phased out.
data.description: In the upcoming weeks, Polymarket plans to enhance its exchange infrastructure by launching fresh contracts and a USDC-supported token, while discontinuing a bridged stablecoin.

data.title: BeFra Appoints Raúl del Villar as Chief Financial Officer
data.description: In Guadalajara, Mexico, Betterware de México, S.A.P.I. de C.V. (NYSE: BWMX), known as BeFra, a prominent direct-to-consumer company in Mexico, revealed the selection of Raúl del Villar as their new Chief Financial Officer. With this appointment effective immediately, Mr. del Villar, who possesses over 30 years of experience in senior finance positions in multinational consumer companies, will take on this crucial role. His most recent position was as the Vice President and Corporate CFO at Grupo Axo.

data.title: Avicanna Announces Changes to its Board of Directors
data.description: On April 6, 2026, Avicanna Inc. (TSX: AVCN) (OTCQX: AVCNF) (FSE: 0NN) shared news of a change in its Board of Directors. John McVicar has stepped down, effective April 1, 2026. In his place, Ozgur Kilic has been appointed to the board. Avicanna, a biopharmaceutical company specializing in plant-derived cannabinoid-based products, looks forward to Mr. Kilic's contribution to the company's development, manufacturing, and commercialization efforts.

data.title: Plains All American Pipeline and Plains GP Holdings Announce Quarterly Distributions and Timing of First Quarter 2026 Earnings
data.description: Plains All American Pipeline, L.P. (Nasdaq: PAA) and Plains GP Holdings (Nasdaq: PAGP) disclosed their quarterly distributions for the first quarter of 2026 in Houston on April 06. The companies also revealed the timeline for the release of their earnings for the same quarter.

data.title: Are SLNO, FORA, AFBI, MKC Obtaining Fair Deals for their Shareholders?
data.description: Potential benefits that insiders could receive surpass those offered to regular shareholders. The suggested transactions might include conditions that restrict better competing bids. Shareholders are advised to reach out to the company to explore their rights and choices for free.

data.title: Cloudastructure to Participate in “Powering the AI Revolution” Virtual Conference Presented by Maxim Group LLC on Tuesday, April 7th at 9:00 a.m. EDT
data.description: Cloudastructure (Nasdaq: CSAI), a top player in AI-driven video surveillance and remote guarding services based in Palo Alto, CA, disclosed that its CEO James McCormick and CFO Greg Smitherman will partake in the "Powering the AI Revolution: Building the Infrastructure Behind Generative AI" online conference by Maxim Group LLC. The event is scheduled for Tuesday, April 7, at 9:00 a.m. EDT.

data.title: Bell Canada renews Medium Term Notes (MTN) program
data.description: On April 6, 2026, in Montreal, Bell Canada (Bell) revealed the submission of a prospectus supplement for the renewal of Bell's MTN program. This supplement was filed alongside a short form base shelf prospectus dated April 2, 2026, with regulatory bodies across all provinces in Canada. The MTN program, which is being renewed, plays a key role in Bell's investment strategy and financial activities.

data.title: PenFed Foundation for Military Heroes Sponsors Honor Flight for Puerto Rico's Veteran Community
data.description: From June 12 to 14, 2026, veterans will be flown from San Juan to Washington D.C. The PenFed Foundation for Military Heroes will be sponsoring an Honor Flight to recognize the service of Puerto Rico's veterans. This event will be held in TYSONS, Va., with the announcement made on April 6, 2026.
